name: Deep Freeze Spray 150ml
description:
Deep Freeze Spray is a rapidly cooling spray that helps to ease pain and swelling by freezing the affected area. It's perfect for those who are suffering from sports injuries and can even be used after exercise to cool your tired muscles. Deep Freeze Spray works by rapidly cooling painful or swollen areas, acting in a similar way to an ice pack.

The cold causes your blood vessels to constrict in the affected area, minimising damage and reducing swelling all at once.  Deep Freeze Spray can be used to reduce short-term pain or pain caused by recent injuries, it can also help to reduce swelling in the affected areas. Deep Freeze Spray can be used for many different kinds of pain that can occur anywhere on the body.

Active Ingredient: Menthol

Features/Benefits:

  • A topical analgesic spray
  • Fast, targeted pain relief
  • Fast-acting pain relief for strains, sprains, muscles and joints
  • Rapidly cools the injured area

Usage:

  • To use Deep Freeze Spray, simply point the nozzle at the affected area and spray for two to three seconds
  • It is advised to not use this spray on open wounds or to apply it to irritated or broken skin
  • The spray should not be used for more than seven days at a time

Caution: Deep Freeze Spray is not an alternative to physiotherapy or professional medical attention. Still, it can help to reduce pain and inflammation associated with minor injuries or strains, making it easier to manage pain and help facilitate healing.

name: Malar-2 Forte DS
description:
Malar-2 Tablet is used to treat acute and uncomplicated malarial infections in patients weighing 5kg (11 lb) and above. This medicine works by killing the parasitic organisms that cause malaria by blocking the synthesis of nucleic acid and proteins. This medicine helps by preventing the growth of malarial parasites.

  • Malar-2 is taken with food.
  • For infants and children who are unable to swallow the tablets, Malar-2 tablets must be crushed and mixed with a small amount of water (one to two teaspoons).
  • If the patient vomits within 1 to 2 hours of taking the Malar-2, a repeated dose of Malar-2 should be used.
  • On the other hand, if the patient vomits the repeated dose, the patient should follow another alternative antimalarial treatment.
  • Avoid grapefruit juice while using Malar-2. Grapefruit juice increases the amount of medicine in the blood.

name: Aerius 5mg Tablets
description:
Aerius 5mg Tablets contain desloratadine, a long-acting, non-drowsy antihistamine used to relieve allergy symptoms. It effectively reduces sneezing, runny nose, itchy or watery eyes, and nasal congestion caused by seasonal allergic rhinitis (hay fever) or chronic urticaria (hives). Aerius works by blocking histamine, a substance in the body responsible for allergic reactions, providing relief for up to 24 hours with just one daily dose.

These tablets are suitable for adults and children aged 12 years and above, offering fast-acting relief without impairing alertness. Aerius 5mg Tablets are taken once daily, with or without food, and are well-tolerated for long-term or seasonal use. For best results, they should be taken regularly during allergy season or as prescribed to control persistent allergy symptoms.

description:
Health Aid's Evening Primrose Oil is a cold-pressed product for maximum purity, rich in many beneficial fatty acids, including GLA. The presence of vitamin E acts as an antioxidant for cell and skin health.

Evening Primrose Oil is a rich source of polyunsaturated fatty acids, based on GLA (Gamma Linoleic Acid), whose role has been found to be related to the production of local hormones known as prostaglandins. Evening primrose oil has been used successfully in women with premenstrual syndrome (PMS), but also in cases of eczema.

In particular, it reduces the symptoms of PMS and in particular irritability, depression, swelling in the abdomen and chest area, and pain in the lower uterine area.

In addition, studies demonstrate the beneficial effect of evening primrose oil in controlling the symptoms of menopause and in particular night hot flashes and sweating.

Health Aid Evening Primrose Oil is a high-quality oil, specially selected for its purity and GLA level. Each capsule also provides 20 mg of Vitamin E which helps protect cells from oxidative stress.

Dosage

  • 1 capsule daily

name: Leorub Ointment 30g (Pack of 2)
description:
Leorub Ointment is a topical analgesic and rubefacient product commonly used for the relief of muscular aches, pains, sprains, and stiffness. It's similar in its application and intended effects to other popular heat rubs.

Here's a breakdown of what you should know about Leorub Ointment:

Key Features & Benefits:

  • Provides warming relief: The active ingredients work to create a warming sensation on the skin.
  • Relieves muscular aches and pains: Effective for soothing sore and tired muscles.
  • Helps with sprains and stiffness: Can be used to ease discomfort associated with minor injuries and muscle stiffness.
  • Rubefacient action: Increases blood flow to the applied area, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation.
  • Topical application: Applied directly to the skin over the affected area.

Typical Active Ingredients:

While the exact formulation might vary slightly, Leorub Ointment typically contains a combination of ingredients that produce a warming and analgesic effect. Common active ingredients include:

  • Methyl Salicylate: A counterirritant that provides a warming sensation and mild analgesic properties. It also has a characteristic wintergreen scent.
  • Menthol: Can provide a cooling sensation initially, followed by warmth, and also has mild analgesic properties.
  • Eucalyptus Oil: May contribute to a warming sensation and has some mild analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. It also provides a characteristic scent.
  • Turpentine Oil: A rubefacient that helps to increase blood flow to the area.

How to Use:

  1. Ensure the affected area of skin is clean and dry.
  2. Apply a thin layer of Leorub Ointment to the sore or stiff muscles or joints.
  3. Gently massage the ointment into the skin until it is absorbed.
  4. Wash your hands thoroughly after application.
  5. Repeat as needed, usually 2-3 times a day.

Important Considerations:

  • For external use only.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Avoid contact with eyes, nostrils, and mucous membranes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.
  • Do not apply to broken, irritated, or sensitive skin.
  • Discontinue use if excessive irritation or a rash develops.
  • Do not use with a heating pad or bandage tightly.
  • Consult a doctor before use if:You are pregnant or breastfeeding.
  • You have poor circulation.
  • Your pain is severe or persists for more than a few days.
  • You are taking other medications, especially blood thinners.
  • Not recommended for children under a certain age (check the product packaging for specific age restrictions).

Possible Side Effects:

When used as directed, Leorub Ointment is generally well-tolerated. However, some individuals may experience:

  • Skin irritation: Redness, burning, or itching at the application site.
  • Allergic reactions: In rare cases, a rash or other allergic reactions may occur.

If you experience any persistent or severe side effects, discontinue use and consult a doctor.

Availability in Accra, Greater Accra Region, Ghana:

Leorub Ointment is likely available in pharmacies and possibly some drug stores and general merchandise stores in Accra and the Greater Accra Region. You can check with your local pharmacies for availability and pricing.
summary_description: Soothing Relief for Muscle & Joint Pain, 50g Tube, Reduces Inflammation, Provides Quick Comfort

name: Metformin Denk 500mg 100's
description:
Uses: Metformin Denk 500mg is prescribed for:

  • Initial therapy: When diet and exercise alone are not enough to control blood sugar levels in adults and children (from 10 years of age and adolescents) with type 2 diabetes.
  • Monotherapy: It can be used alone.
  • Combination therapy: It can be used in combination with other oral anti-diabetic agents or with insulin to achieve better blood glucose control.
  • Reducing diabetic complications: In overweight adults with type 2 diabetes, it has been shown to reduce the risk of long-term complications.

Dosage:

  • Adults: The usual starting dose is 500 mg or 850 mg two or three times daily, taken during or after meals. The dose is gradually increased over 10 to 15 days based on blood glucose measurements. The maximum recommended daily dose of metformin hydrochloride is 3 grams (3000 mg), usually taken as 3 divided doses.
  • Children (from 10 years of age and adolescents): The usual starting dose is 500 mg or 850 mg once daily, taken during or after meals. The daily dose can be increased up to a maximum of 2 grams (2000 mg), taken as 2 or 3 divided doses.
  • Administration: Tablets should be swallowed whole with sufficient fluids during or after meals to minimize gastrointestinal side effects. If multiple tablets are needed, they should be distributed throughout the day (e.g., one after breakfast and one after dinner).
  • Important: Always follow your doctor's instructions regarding dosage and administration. Do not self-adjust your dose.

Side Effects: Common side effects are often gastrointestinal and tend to occur when starting the medication, usually improving over time:


  • Nausea
  • Vomiting
  • Diarrhea (very common, can be managed by taking with meals or sometimes by switching to an extended-release form if available)
  • Abdominal pain/discomfort
  • Loss of appetite
  • Metallic taste in the mouth
  • Headache
  • Dizziness
  • Fatigue/Tiredness
  • Flatulence (gas)

Serious but rare side effects:

  • Lactic Acidosis: This is a very rare but serious and potentially fatal condition. It occurs due to a build-up of lactic acid in the blood. The risk is increased if you have kidney problems, severe infections, dehydration, liver problems, heart failure, or consume excessive alcohol. Symptoms include:
  • Severe tiredness
  • Difficulty breathing
  • Stomach ache with muscle cramps
  • Reduced body temperature and heartbeat
  • Unexplained weight loss If you experience any symptoms of lactic acidosis, stop taking Metformin Denk 500mg and seek immediate medical attention.
  • Vitamin B12 deficiency: Long-term use of metformin can lead to reduced vitamin B12 levels, which can cause anemia (low red blood cells). Your doctor may monitor your B12 levels.
  • Hypoglycemia (low blood sugar): While metformin alone usually doesn't cause hypoglycemia, the risk increases if it's taken with other diabetes medications like sulfonylureas or insulin.

Contraindications (When not to take Metformin Denk 500mg): You should not take Metformin Denk 500mg if you have:

  • Allergy to metformin or any other ingredients in the tablet.

  • Severe kidney problems or severely reduced kidney function (as this increases the risk of lactic acidosis).
  • Liver problems (hepatic insufficiency).
  • Uncontrolled diabetes with severe hyperglycemia, nausea, vomiting, rapid weight loss, lactic acidosis, or ketoacidosis.
  • Acute conditions that can impair kidney function, such as:
  • Dehydration (due to persistent vomiting, severe diarrhea)
  • Severe infections
  • Circulatory collapse (shock)
  • Intravenous administration of iodinated contrast materials (for X-rays/scans) – you will usually need to stop metformin before and for a period after such procedures.

  • Acute or chronic diseases that can cause tissue oxygen deficiency, such as:
  • Cardiac or respiratory failure
  • Recent myocardial infarction (heart attack)

  • Circulatory collapse (shock)
  • Acute alcohol intoxication or alcoholism.
  • Breastfeeding.

Important Considerations:

  • Alcohol: Avoid excessive alcohol intake while taking Metformin Denk 500mg, as it significantly increases the risk of lactic acidosis.

  • Pregnancy: If you are pregnant or planning to become pregnant, inform your doctor. Insulin is generally preferred for diabetes management during pregnancy.
  • Surgery: Inform your doctor if you are planning to have major surgery, as you may need to stop Metformin Denk 500mg for a period before and after the procedure.
  • Monitoring: Your doctor will regularly monitor your blood sugar levels, kidney function, and potentially vitamin B12 levels during treatment.

  • Diet and Exercise: Metformin is most effective when used in conjunction with a balanced diet and regular exercise.

Always consult your doctor or pharmacist for personalized advice and to ensure this medication is appropriate for your specific health condition.
summary_description: Helps control blood glucose levels in type 2 diabetes, improves insulin sensitivity, taken daily.

name: Gillette 2 Shaving Sticks
description:
Product Name

Gillette 2 Shaving Sticks


Brand / Manufacturer

Gillette – manufactured by Procter & Gamble 


Form & Pack Size

Disposable twin‑blade razors with lubricating strip; commonly sold in packs of 5 or bulk sets with 24 packs (120 razors total) 


Design & Features

Two precision blades coated with platinum for smooth, close shave with minimal tug or pull 


Lubra‑strip infused with aloe for skin glide and mild moisturisation during shaving 


Lightweight, ergonomic plastic handle (“Ultragrip”) for improved control 


Indications / Uses

Designed for everyday shaving to remove facial or body hair with minimal irritation and ease of use—ideal for travel, gym bags, or frequent disposable use 


Mechanism of Action

The twin-blade design with lubricating strip helps the razor glide over skin, reducing friction and irritation while providing a close shave. Aloe from the lubrastrip helps protect sensitive skin 

Paperstone


Key Benefits

Affordable and convenient—no maintenance required


Comfortable for daily or occasional use


Minimised skin irritation thanks to lubrication and smooth blades


Widely available in multipack formats for long-lasting supply


Usage Instructions

Wet skin and hair.


Apply shaving cream or gel.


Hold the razor at a light angle (~30°) and shave gently in the direction of hair growth.


Rinse blade after each pass.


Dispose of razor after 5–7 uses or when performance declines 


Precautions / Contraindications

For external use only


Avoid reuse when the blade becomes dull or rusted


Discontinue use if persistent skin irritation, cuts, or allergic reaction occur


Not suitable for use on highly sensitive or broken skin


Storage Instructions

Store in a cool, dry place


Keep out of reach of children


Do not leave in damp environments to prevent blade corrosion


 Summary Table

Feature         Description

Blades       2 platinum-coated precision blades

Lubrication    Aloe-infused lubra‑strip

Handle       Lightweight plastic Ultragrip

Pack Sizes 5 pack, 120 bulk pack available

Ideal For Everyday shaving, travel use

Care      Single-use/disposable, rinse after each shave
summary_description: Twin blades for close shave, aloe strip, 2-pack, disposable razors.

name: Wisdom Dental Floss 50m
description:
Wisdom Dental Floss cleans the hard-to-reach areas between the teeth and along the gum line where plaque and food debris can build up.


Contains fluoride to help prevent decay, mint to leave your mouth feeling clean and fresh and a wax coating for a smooth easy clean.


Use morning and night when brushing to help keep your teeth and gums healthy, protect against gum disease and tooth decay and keep your breath fresh.Dentists recommend that flossing should be used as part of your daily dental care regime


Key features:




Dosage: Apply twice daily 


Precaution : Keep it out of reach of children
